categories.name: Subdomain Coverage
categories.methodology: Two-pass verification. Pass 1: For each of 14 subdomains, grep-searched all 67 produced agent files for subdomain-name keywords (e.g. 'worldbuild', 'continuity', 'craft.knowledge'). Pass 2: Cross-referenced all 26 test-plan.json scenarios against subdomain names and IDs to verify test coverage. Both passes confirmed full coverage.
categories.notes: All 14 subdomains covered by 2–32 agent files each. All 14 subdomains exercised by test scenarios. SD-001 (user-guide-and-input) has the fewest direct references (2 agents — guide and concept-developer) but this is appropriate since the guide is the entry point. Clean since cycle 1.

categories.name: Invariant Enforcement
categories.methodology: Two-pass verification. Pass 1: Grep-searched all 67 agent prompt files for each INV-NNN identifier (INV-001 through INV-081). Zero unreferenced invariants. Pass 2: Enumerated the reference distribution and spot-checked all 8 single-reference invariants: INV-025 (originality-beta-reader), INV-028 (style-analyzer), INV-062 (craft-profile-selector), INV-065/067/077/080 (guide), INV-071 (series-kb-manager). Each single-reference invariant is correctly scoped to its specialist domain.
categories.notes: Distribution: 8 invariants with 1 ref, 8 with 2, 11 with 3, 13 with 4, 16 with 5, 10 with 6, 4 with 7, 4 with 8, 1 with 9, 3 with 10, 1 with 11, 1 with 15, 1 with 67 (INV-030 universal). All 8 single-reference invariants confirmed correctly scoped. Clean since cycle 1.

categories.name: Routing Completeness
categories.methodology: Two-pass verification. Pass 1: Compared all 20 roster routing agents (1 orchestrator + 9 coordinators + 10 sub-coordinators) against routing.json entries — exact 20/20 match. Verified 163 total route entries, zero empty actions. Verified all 60 dispatched agents exist in roster AND have produced .agent.md files. Checked all termination paths. Pass 2: Audited result code vocabulary — 6 result values used in conditions ('complete', 'completed', 'passed', 'blocked', 'failed', 'revision-loop'). Verified each maps to a defined result code in agent resultCodeMappings. Confirmed convergence bounds: maxAuditorRetries=3, maxRevisionBetaCycles=2, maxChaptersBeforeCheckpoint=5. Confirmed revision-beta loop has explicit maxCycles=2 with graceful degradation (proceed with best-effort).
categories.notes: 163 routes across 20 routing agents. Result code vocabulary is intentionally differentiated: specialists report 'completed', auditors report 'passed'/'rejected', coordinators report 'complete'/'blocked'/'revision-loop'. All paths terminate. All convergence bounds present and documented. Zero ghost agent references in dispatch actions (60 dispatched agents all verified). Clean since cycle 1.

categories.name: Artifact Coverage
categories.methodology: Pass 1: Extracted all 42 artifacts from architecture.json (universal + domainSpecific). For each, verified (a) writers array is non-empty and all writer names resolve to roster.json agents (full or shorthand), (b) readers array is non-empty and all reader names resolve to roster agents or are valid generics ('all agents', 'phase auditors', etc.), (c) all 18 schema files exist in output/romantic-fantasy-writer/schemas/. Pass 2: Read every schema file and cross-checked that all 42 artifact names appear in at least one schema document. Result: 42/42 artifacts have writers, readers, and schema coverage.

resolvedFromPreviousCycles.evidence: Remains fixed. craft-profile.json has single writer (craft-profile-selector) in architecture.json.
Remains fixed. chapters/{N}/draft.md has 4 writers in architecture.json.

categories.notes: All 42 artifacts fully covered. 18 schema files map to all artifact categories. No orphan writers or readers. Clean since cycle 3.

categories.name: Test Coverage
categories.methodology: Pass 1: Cross-referenced 26 test scenarios against required coverage dimensions. Checked: (a) all 5 agent levels (orchestrator=10, coordinator=17, sub-coordinator=2, specialist=7, guide=1), (b) all 9 pipeline passes (concept=12, worldbuilding=5, character=6, plotting=3, style=3, drafting=6, revision=6, beta-reading=3, polish=8), (c) error paths (13 scenarios with blocked/failed/rejected), (d) re-entry (2 scenarios), (e) convergence exhaustion (2 scenarios: TEST-005 worldbuilding blocked, TEST-006 revision-beta loop). Pass 2: Specifically verified forced-delivery coverage — TEST-022 'Delivered-with-gaps polish-coordinator blocked' exercises the delivered-with-gaps result code, which is the forced-delivery path. All dimensions have ≥1 scenario.
categories.notes: 26 scenarios across 7 categories cover all required areas: 5 agent levels, 9 pipeline passes, error paths, re-entry, convergence, and forced delivery. Priority distribution: P0=7, P1=16, P2=3. Clean since cycle 1.

categories.name: Cross-Reference Integrity
categories.methodology: Pass 1: (a) Extracted all romantic-fantasy-writer-* references from 67 agent prompt files — 0 dangling. (b) Checked routing.json dispatch targets and routing table agent names against roster — 0 issues. (c) Verified 81 invariant affectedSubdomains reference valid SD-NNN IDs — 0 issues. (d) Checked architecture.json for plot-architect — only in designNote, not readers/writers. Pass 2: (a) Scanned 9 skill files — all refs valid. (b) Scanned 18 schema files — all refs valid. (c) Regex-checked architecture.json — all romantic-fantasy-writer-* names in roster. Verified CR-004: foreshadowing-ledger.json readers=[tension-mapper, adversarial-auditor, craft-beta-reader, continuity-tracker]. Verified CR-005: mystery-box-inventory.json readers=[tension-mapper, chapter-drafter, adversarial-auditor].

resolvedFromPreviousCycles.evidence: foreshadowing-ledger.json readers no longer contains 'plot-architect'. Now: [tension-mapper, adversarial-auditor, craft-beta-reader, continuity-tracker].
mystery-box-inventory.json readers no longer contains 'plot-architect'. Now: [tension-mapper, chapter-drafter, adversarial-auditor].

categories.notes: All cross-references valid. 67 prompts, 18 schemas, 9 skills, routing.json, architecture.json — zero dangling references. CR-004/CR-005 confirmed resolved. Convergence: 22 → 6 → 2 → 0.

categories.name: Bootstrap Completeness
categories.methodology: Extracted all 67 agent names from roster.json and verified 1:1 match against the AGENTS array in bootstrap.sh (diff returned empty). Validated bootstrap.sh bash syntax with bash -n (exit code 0). Confirmed set -euo pipefail safety flags present. Verified all 4 universal artifact templates are seeded (story-config.json, progress.json, manifest.json, agents/*/status.json). Verified all 6 cross-cutting tracker artifacts seeded (continuity-tracker.json, foreshadowing-ledger.json, information-asymmetry-map.json, mystery-box-inventory.json, emotional-throughline.json, symbolic-motif-registry.json). Verified 9 audit-report subdirectories created (one per phase). Verified series KB conditional seeding. Verified guard against double-init. Verified clean user instructions at exit.
categories.notes: Third consecutive clean cycle. 67/67 roster agents present in bootstrap AGENTS array. All artifact seeds include proper JSON templates with dynamic storyId/seriesId interpolation. Bootstrap script is syntactically valid. No regressions.

categories.name: Documentation Completeness
categories.methodology: Verified README.md (356 lines) documents all 67 agents with correct hierarchy breakdown (Guide=1, Orchestrator=1, Coordinators=9, Sub-Coordinators=10, Specialists=46 — matches roster.json level counts exactly). Verified 18 schema files exist with substantive content (53-208 lines each). Verified 9 skills documented in README skills table matching profile.json skills array and actual skills/ directories. Verified convergence bounds in README (maxAuditorRetries=3, maxRevisionBetaCycles=2) match profile.json. Verified README directory tree matches bootstrap.sh mkdir structure. Verified 26 test directories (TEST-001 through TEST-026) exist, each containing context.json, expected-status.json, and README.md. Verified README test priority table (P0=7, P1=16, P2=3) totaling 26. Verified result codes documentation covers all 4 agent levels plus special routing signals. Checked for TODO/FIXME/PLACEHOLDER markers (none found). Verified zero 'ralph'/'copilot'/'fractal-factory' external references across all agent files and skills.
categories.notes: Third consecutive clean cycle. README is internally consistent across all cross-referenced sections. All 18 schemas, 9 skills, 26 test directories present with substantive content. No external system references detected. No regressions.

categories.name: Meta-Knowledge Infrastructure
categories.methodology: Verified factory-level meta-knowledge pipeline: progress.json includes pass0 (status=completed) and synthesis (status=pending) fields. Architecture.json pipeline includes knowledge-curation pass. context.json has metaKnowledge.enabled=true with domainSignalName='craft'. Verified all 9 produced skills contain domain-specific content (59-109 lines) with zero external system references. Verified all 67 agent files exist in output/agents/ matching roster.json exactly. Verified profile.json skills array (9 entries) matches actual skills/ directories (9 directories). Verified produced system is self-contained — no references to Ralph Orchestrator, Copilot CLI, or Fractal Factory in any agent prompt or skill file.
categories.notes: Third consecutive clean cycle. Factory meta-knowledge pipeline (pass0 + synthesis) properly configured. All produced skills are self-contained with domain-appropriate content. No regressions.
